beforeEach(() => {
    sqlite = new BetterSqlite3(":memory:");
    sqlite.pragma("foreign_keys = ON");
    sqlite.exec(`
      CREATE TABLE workspaces (
        id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
        title TEXT NOT NULL,
        status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
        metadata TEXT DEFAULT '{}',
        created_at INTEGER NOT NULL,
        updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL
      );

      CREATE TABLE acp_sessions (
        id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
        name TEXT,
        cwd TEXT NOT NULL,
        branch TEXT,
        workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
        routa_agent_id TEXT,
        provider TEXT,
        role TEXT,
        mode_id TEXT,
        model TEXT,
        first_prompt_sent INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        message_history TEXT DEFAULT '[]',
        parent_session_id TEXT,
        specialist_id TEXT,
        execution_mode TEXT,
        owner_instance_id TEXT,
        lease_expires_at INTEGER,
        created_at INTEGER NOT NULL,
        updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL
      );

      CREATE TABLE session_messages (
        id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
        session_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES acp_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
        message_index INTEGER NOT NULL,
        event_type TEXT NOT NULL,
        payload TEXT NOT NULL,
        created_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (unixepoch('now') * 1000)
      );
    `);
    const now = Date.now();
    sqlite.prepare(`
      INSERT INTO workspaces (id, title, status, metadata, created_at, updated_at)
      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
    `).run("workspace-1", "Workspace One", "active", "{}", now, now);

    store = new SqliteAcpSessionStore(drizzle(sqlite, { schema: sqliteSchema }));
  })

beforeEach(() => {
        store = new Store(':memory:')

        hapiHomeRoot = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'auto-migrate-test-'))
